original_abstract: MOFs with high water uptake capacity and hydrothermal stability are gaining attention for low temperature heat transformation applications such as thermally driven adsorption chillers or adsorption heat pumps.
humanized_abstract: Metal Organic Frameworks (MOFs) with high water uptake and good hydrothermal stability have attracted increasing attention for low temperature heat transformation applications such as thermally driven adsorption chillers and adsorption heat pumps.

document.output: Metal Organic Frameworks (MOFs) with high water uptake and good hydrothermal stability have attracted increasing attention for low temperature heat transformation applications such as thermally driven adsorption chillers and adsorption heat pumps.
document.input: MOFs with high water uptake capacity and hydrothermal stability are gaining attention for low temperature heat transformation applications such as thermally driven adsorption chillers or adsorption heat pumps.
